titleStmt.title: SII 8.584: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 584. (A.R. No. 276 of 1903). ON THE SAME BASE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumakaḷpolap perunilaccelviyum taṉakkey Urimai pūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷak kāntaḷūrccālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkaināṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyū nuḷamppāṭiyūn taṭikaipāṭiyūṅ kuṭamalaināṭuṅ kollamuṅ kaliṅkamum Eṇṭicai pukaḻtara Īḻamaṇṭamum Iraṭṭapāṭi yeḻaraiyilakkamun
tiṇṭiṟalveṉṟit taṇṭāṟ koṇṭu taṉṉeḻil vaḷaruḻiyu ḷellāyāṇṭun toḻutakay viḷaṅkum yāṇṭey ceḻiyarait tecukoḷ śrīkoirājarājakecaripaṉmarāṉa śrīkoirājarājade varkku yāṇṭu 2 10 4Āvatu keraḷāntakavaḷanāṭ ṭuṟaiyūrkkūṟṟattut tirupparāyttuṟai ma hāde varkku pāṇṭikulācaṉivaḷanā
ṭṭu vaṭciṟuvāyilnāṭṭu viraikkum viraikkuṭāṉ kalliṟaipaṭṭaṉ keraḷān=ta kavaḷanāṭṭu Uṟaiyūrkkūṟṟattu brahma teyam vicaiyāṅkuraccaruppetimaṅkalattu nilam śrīuttamacoḻade varkku yāṇṭu 10 3Āvatu vilaikkuk koṇṭu Aiyppikaiviṣu vum cittiraiviṣu vum tirumañcaṇam Aruḷavum Amutu ceytaruḷavum
cattukku Āṇṭuvarai poṉ Irukaḻañcaraikku ceyta nilam Eḻu muḷḷurmiyūr viṣṇu viḷākattu mākāṇiyum koṇṭu Ippaṭi celuttuvatākavum Ivaṉ makaṉ paṭṭaṉ kaṇṭarukaṇṭaṉ tirupparāyttuṟai nilappāḻil Ivaṉ vāyttalil kalli vayakkuvicca nilam Oru māvum ḻivilakkula nilam kallivayakkiṉa
nilam Araimāvum Āka Orumāvaraiyāl mācimakatti ṉāṉṟu peruntiruvamurtu ceytaruḷa cūlakkālāl Iruka
la Ariciyāṟ peruntiruvamurtu ceytaruḷaveṇṭum vicattukku Uḷppaṭa nel cūlakkālāl Eḻuka
laṉe tūṇip patakkum Ippaṭi śantrā tittaval celvatākavum . Itu panmā- heśvara rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 8.584 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
